query:
INSERT INTO schedules (
  orderId,
  customerId,
  customerName,
  salesName,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  otherFee,
  partnerFee,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryClassroom,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  classDate,
  classTime,
  startTime,
  endTime,
  courseType,
  location,
  teacherName,
  status,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
)
SELECT 
  id as orderId,
  customerId,
  customerName,
  salesPerson as salesName,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  otherFee,
  partnerFee,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryRoom as deliveryClassroom,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  classDate,
  classTime,
  CONCAT(classDate, ' 09:00:00') as startTime,
  CONCAT(classDate, ' 10:00:00') as endTime,
  COALESCE(deliveryCourse, '未知课程') as courseType,
  deliveryRoom as location,
  deliveryTeacher as teacherName,
  'scheduled' as status,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM orders
WHERE classDate IS NOT NULL;

  classDate,
  classTime,
  startTime,
  endTime,
  courseType,
  location,
  teacherName,
  status,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
)
SELECT 
  id as orderId,
  customerId,
  customerName,
  salesPerson as salesName,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  otherFee,
  partnerFee,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryRoom as deliveryClassroom,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  classDate,
  classTime,
  CONCAT(classDate, ' 09:00:00') as startTime,
  CONCAT(classDate, ' 10:00:00') as endTime,
  COALESCE(deliveryCourse, '未知课程') as courseType,
  deliveryRoom as location,
  deliveryTeacher as teacherName,
  'scheduled' as status,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM orders
WHERE classDate IS NOT NULL;
